program_name: MS in Business Analytics and Artificial Intelligence

required_internship.description: All students must fulfill the internship requirement to graduate. This counts as part of your elective credits.
required_internship.first_internship_note: Use BUAN 6009 if you have secured an actual internship. It can be taken for 0, 1, 2, or 3 credits. Credits earned (if any) count as elective credits toward your 36-credit total. Can only be used for your first internship.
required_internship.fulfillment_note: Use BUAN 6390 or BUAN 6V98 if you do not have an internship or for any internship after your first. These count as elective credits.
required_internship.ineligibility_note: Once you complete BUAN 6390 or BUAN 6V98, you are permanently ineligible to enroll in BUAN 6009.
required_internship.additional_internship_note: Any internship after the first must use BUAN 6V98 (maximum 3 credit hours total across all enrollments).
